summary: CI pipeline validation complete — no GitHub Actions workflow changes required for iter-2. All Flutter dependencies (firebase_messaging, flutter_local_notifications) already declared in pubspec.yaml. All 12 GitHub Actions secrets from iter-1 cover iter-2 completely. docs/DEPLOY.md updated with iter-2 pre-flight checklist, backend DATABASE_URL note, iOS APNs setup, Android notification channel requirements. Pre-flight gates: CI syntax valid, secrets audit complete, test flow verified. QA confirms 21 new tests passing, 0 new violations, 64 total pass / 1 pre-existing fail. Backend DATABASE_URL is rideglory-api scope, not Flutter CI. Ready for tech lead PR review.
